clock_reset: start clk, input_clk, and output_clk at 10 ns
deassert resets and wait for the internal reset synchronizers
configure base address 0x1000, size mask 0x0fff, and cfg_enable
driver: split each payload across the two input segments
pad payloads to the 32-bit stream width
drive input_valid until input_ready accepts each segment
apply simple pause patterns to stream and AXI RAM channels
model: AxiRam models the external backing store for generated AXI reads and writes
DataSink reconstructs output bytes from both segments in order
scoreboard: read the same number of bytes from the output stream for each payload
compare output bytes against the padded input payload
clear queues around a directed cfg_reset and verify post-reset payloads still pass
